The internet's been going crazy over for the last 20 years. Something tells me you won't miss any of these things. So once again, this is where we are anchoring in their present reality to build trust in bringing our future pace further up. So we're anchoring it all right here in this current reality and building trust, which is good because after leading over 640 coaches, consultants and experts into true freedom in their business, we've clued in on the exact anatomy of transformation that awaits you. So when you enroll in X, here's what your next few weeks will look like. So now we begin to pace it out. The part of you that's been getting these emails, skipping them in bed every morning and freaking out whether or not you're going to take the plunge will finally break through. So we really paint a very specific picture of what that looks like both externally and internally as far as their beliefs and thoughts go. Tomorrow you wake up feeling amazing, clear, focused and excited to get to work free from that stinging sense of virus and more said you felt in the past when you intuitively knew you just fell for another guru's empty promise or have or gave into your shiny objects engine. So the next version of it is a little more complex. This is when we sent out for 10 X landing pages a few years ago. And it's a tale of two marketers and it's essentially very close to the one we just learned, except we're contrasting to realities. We're contrasting growth marketer A, you know, the person who clicked away from the page who didn't buy and growth marketer B, who ended up buying. So we're just contrasting our future pacing out to different versions of them. The one who buys and the one who doesn't buy. So that's another way you could put this to use.
